title: UBSE result 2026 out LIVE: Uttarakhand class 10 and 12 results out on ubse.uk.gov.in; two girls share top rank in 12th
description: UBSE result 2026 out LIVE: The Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) has announced the class 10 and class 12 board exam results for 2026. Students can access their UBSE results on ubse.uk.gov.in using their roll numbers. Stay tuned for live updates, direct link, toppers list and more.
